name: Baked Chicken with Herbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into pieces; cut each breast half into halves and remove the skin.
2. Heat margarine and oil in a rectangular pan that is 13x9x2 inches in a 375°F oven until the margarine is melted.
3. Stir in all remaining ingredients except the chicken.
4. Place the chicken, meaty side down, in the pan, turning to coat with the herb mixture.
5. Cook uncovered for 30 minutes.
6. Turn the chicken and cook until the thickest pieces are done, about 30 minutes longer.
